Subject: Operational/Cyber Incident and Training Bulletin — Thainova Utilities Public Company Limited (TNVU), listed on the Thaikhet Exchange (TKE).
Date/time: 03 Jun 2026 09:30 ICT; internal distribution for routine operations and compliance alignment.
Event summary: Overnight monitoring flagged abnormal API calls to the ESG data mart during a scheduled tabletop drill, causing a brief read-only mode.
Public status: A website notice on 02 Jun already announced the portal maintenance and no customer impact; this reiterates that message.
Training scope: Today’s tabletop covers crypto wallet hygiene for the REC pilot sandbox and information‑barrier etiquette between Operations and Investor Relations; educational only.
Terminology note: References to “blackout”, “tipping”, “insider list”, and “commercial terms” below are training contexts unless explicitly marked otherwise.
Positive — MNPI handling: Preliminary containment notes indicate a third‑party admin token briefly accessed a staging folder with draft 2026 GHG intensity targets and unannounced pricing bands for a renewable‑credit token pilot; treat as potentially price‑sensitive under TKE rules pending verification.
PDPA note: No PDPA breach identified; logs show no access to customer names, national IDs, addresses, or payroll; sample IDs (e.g., ID-XXXX-1234) in screenshots are placeholders.
Operations impact: 17 minutes of read‑only mode on the ESG dashboard; KPIs and One‑Report timing remain unchanged and publicly communicated.
Controls applied: ESG mart temporarily segregated; firewall policy TNVU‑NET‑SEG‑26A and data keys rotated; routine control enhancement.
Insider compliance training: Staff are reminded not to discuss draft metrics externally and to avoid “tipping” rumors; hospitality tipping in the canteen is unrelated to securities law.
Information barrier and blackout: The “blackout” in the LMS refers to the intranet upgrade window, not a share‑dealing restriction; desk‑to‑desk chats should follow the internal info‑barrier guide.
Insider list materials: The Insider List template IL‑TRAIN‑26 is provided for LMS practice only and contains no real names or roles.
Commercial terms samples: Vendor renewal “commercial terms” in the deck are generic exemplars and not binding offers or negotiations.
Regulatory context: We will notify the fictional Securities and Markets Authority of Nakhonthai (SMAN) only if the event meets materiality; current assessment is non‑material.
Contacts: For queries use role mailboxes ir@thainova.example and privacy@thainova.example; the public helpline +66‑000‑0000 is a test number for drills only.
